title: Initialize Repository and CI/CD
description: Scaffold Next.js App Router, configure TailwindCSS, establish linting and folder structure.

title: Define Supabase Database Schema
description: Write migrations for ews_users, ews_projects, ews_chapters, ews_conversations, ews_ai_prompts.

title: Implement Authentication
description: Integrate Supabase Auth for co-author login and session management.

title: Build Project Dashboard
description: Create the main internal dashboard showing active projects and recent changes.

title: Collaborative Chapter Editor
description: Implement the rich-text editor for drafting narrative chapters.

title: Conversations Idea Board
description: Create transcription and chat interface for recording raw dialogues.

title: Integrate LLM Services
description: Build backend API routes to communicate with OpenAI/Anthropic for text generation.

title: AI Copilot Module (The Muse)
description: Add the conversational AI interface to the studio for brainstorming.

title: AI Image & Audio Generation
description: Integrate APIs for Midjourney/DALL-E and Suno/Udio to generate media assets.

title: Inline AI Writing Assistant
description: Connect the LLM to the Chapter Editor for inline autocompletion and synthesis.

title: Public Reader Landing Page
description: Design and build public-facing index page for reader access.

title: Multimedia Reading UI
description: Develop the immersive reading view syncing text with AI-generated audio and art.
